title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 successfully completed Pokémon FireRed using only vision-based game screenshots without maps, navigation aids, or structured game-state information. This represents an improvement over earlier Claude models which required complex helper infrastructure to play the game.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only vision-based game screenshots, without maps, navigation aids, or structured game-state information. It marks a shift from earlier Claude models, which depended on complex helper infrastructure to play the game. The takeaway is that the model handled object detection and in-game navigation directly from raw visual input, operating as an agent on the unmodified screen.
